Supervision or monitoring of a ceasefire: Actions to gather information on whether an agreement to stop fighting is being respected.
Provision of a security umbrella: Providing security and maintaining public order to protect people, property and State institutions.
Supporting the political process: Helping end conflict or maintain peace through negotiations, dialogue, reconciliation and institution‑building.
Mine action: Reducing the threat and impact of landmines and explosive remnants of war.
Disarmament, demobilization and reintegr: Collection and disposal of weapons, discharge of combatants, and transition to civilian status and employment.
Security sector reform (SSR): Building effective, accountable and sustainable security institutions and personnel.
Rule of law related activities: Strengthening police, justice, corrections and oversight institutions.
Electoral assistance: Legal, technical and logistical support to electoral laws, processes and institutions.
Support to restoration and extension of: Rebuilding legitimacy and public confidence in State institutions.
Facilitating delivery of humanitarian as: Establishing security and coordination so humanitarian actors can deliver water, food, shelter and medical care.
Cooperating with mission partners on pov: Assisting development partners, mobilizing donor funds and supporting UN Country Team priorities.
Protection and promotion of human rights: Monitoring, investigating and reporting violations, empowering people and building State capacity to uphold rights.
Women, Peace and Security (WPS) agenda: Promoting equality, empowerment and participation of women and girls, and ensuring their protection in conflict.
Protection of civilians (POC): Coordinated civilian and uniformed mission activities to prevent, deter or respond to threats of physical violence.
Addressing conflict‑related sexual viole: Preventing and responding to sexual violence in conflict through monitoring, advocacy and political dialogue.
Child protection: Protecting children from violence, neglect and abuse, monitoring violations and engaging with conflict parties.
